chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 138 of 2021 _____________________________________________________ Date Order.with signature of Judge Hearing/Priority 1.For order on CMA No.2178/21 2.For order on office objection/reply as at A 3.For hearing of main case 4.For hearing of CMA No.1520/21 (stay) 31.10.2023 None for Appellant Mr. Akhtar Ali Memon, Advocate for Respondent Nos.1 and 2......... Learned Counsel for Respondent Nos.1 and 2 does not oppose this appeal. Consequently, the order dated 01.06.2021 passed in Suit No.2414/2015 is set aside whereby Respondent Nos.1 and 2’s suit identified above was decreed to the extent of Prayer Clause (d). He, however, submits that in fact after passing Preliminary Decree and relinquishment of shares, his suit has become infructuous and he would not press this suit. Consequently, in view of the above, although the order impugned is set aside but the suit itself is dismissed as not pressed as has become infructuous. J U D G E J U D G E Ashraf
